## What & why

Briefly: what does this change, and why?

## Type

- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling / deps / repo hygiene
- [ ] refactor — behavior-preserving restructuring

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm test` passes (if behavior changed, tests updated/added)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed (config stays in env / `.env`)

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the branch → PR → squash-merge cadence.
